stateNotes.implementedLocal: Bounded Cloud control plane, product-isolated metadata and bytes, Web/PWA, Android/iOS source, provider adapters, multipart/direct uploads, artifacts, export/delete, observability, persistent zero-charge usage metering, capacity candidate, and JavaScript SDK exist at sourceCommit. This does not claim production durability.
stateNotes.testedLocal: Go Cloud tests, Web/SDK tests, static/a11y gates, canonical API smoke, migration, and backup/restore pass locally. Unrelated repository consensus tests require an absent generated Devtools artifact and are not used as Cloud evidence.
stateNotes.installedLocal: The exact Android Testnet Preview APK in the artifact manifest was installed and cold-launched with adb; the evidence screenshot is indexed. iOS local installation is not claimed.
stateNotes.integratedCentral: False: central Wallet registrations remain disabled and pending review.
stateNotes.deployedStaging: False: no staging endpoint or remote smoke evidence exists.
stateNotes.deployedPublic: False: no public endpoint or public verification exists.
stateNotes.downloadHosted: False: the APK is local and has no immutable hosted URL.
stateNotes.productionSigned: False: the Android APK uses a debug certificate and no production signing evidence exists.
stateNotes.storeReleased: False: no app-store release evidence exists.
